data.name: Minimum Interval Between C1D1 and C1D4 Priming Doses
Minimum Interval Between C1D4 and C1D8 (First Full Dose)
Vital Signs Monitoring Frequency During Hospitalization
BMA Repeat if CR Criteria Met Except Plasma Cells
Investigational Drug Washout Period (5 Half-Lives Alternative)
Pregnancy Test Post Last Dose Window
C1D4 Dose Escalation to Full Dose Interval
QW to Q2W Dosing Transition Criteria
data.description: Criteria for changing dose interval from weekly to every 2 weeks
data.text: Participant has received QW dosing for at least 6 cycles and has achieved an IMWG response category of PR or better persisting for at least 2 months

data.name: Redosing Criteria - Start of Cycle
data.description: All parameters must be met before re-treatment at the start of any new cycle
data.text: ANC ≥1.0 × 10^9/L; Platelet count ≥25 × 10^9/L; Recovery of treatment-related nonhematologic toxicities to baseline or Grade ≤1 severity; No ongoing CRS or ICANS (any grade); Recovery of treatment-emergent peripheral neuropathy to Grade <1 severity

data.name: Priming Dose Completion Requirement
data.description: Both priming doses must be received before full dose
data.text: Participants must receive both elranatamab priming doses (12 mg C1D1 and 32 mg C1D4) before receiving the planned full dose (76 mg)

data.name: Continued Treatment Criteria
data.description: Criteria for continuing study intervention
data.text: Each participant may receive study intervention until confirmed disease progression, unacceptable toxicity, withdrawal of consent, or study termination

data.name: Post-Discontinuation Disease Assessment Continuation
data.description: Conditions for continuing disease assessments after treatment discontinuation without confirmed PD
data.text: For participants who discontinue study intervention without confirmed PD: perform assessments at EOT visit, then at least Q4W (±1 wk) until confirmed PD, withdrawal of consent, initiation of subsequent anticancer therapy, participant lost to follow-up, death or defined end of study

data.name: Screening Lab Assessment Timing for C1D1
data.description: Screening labs may substitute for C1D1 if within 72 hours
data.text: SPEP, SIFE, serum FLC, UPEP, UIFE required at Screening and C1D1 (if not done within 72 hours prior to dosing)

data.name: CRS Susceptibility Exclusion
data.description: Exclusion of participants particularly susceptible to CRS complications
data.text: Participants with impaired cardiac function or clinically significant cardiovascular disease are excluded to ensure tolerance of potential CRS events

data.name: Peripheral Neuropathy Exclusion Criteria
data.description: Exclusion of participants susceptible to new or worsening peripheral neuropathy
data.text: Excludes participants with POEMS syndrome, history of GBS or GBS variants, ongoing Grade ≥2 peripheral neuropathy, and history of prior neuropathy with BCMA-directed drugs

data.name: Imaging at Suspected CR/sCR Condition
data.description: Imaging required at suspected CR/sCR unless recently performed
data.text: Imaging required at suspected CR/sCR if not performed within the prior 6 weeks

data.name: Urine Response Assessment Limitation
data.description: Conditions for when serum FLC can be used for response assessment
data.text: Participants with measurable disease by SPEP or UPEP cannot have response assessed by serum FLC. Serum FLC levels should only be used for response assessment when both the serum and urine M component levels are deemed not measurable or uninterpretable. Serum FLC cannot replace UPEP/UIFE in any situation where urine M component is measurable at baseline.

data.name: Screening to Treatment Transition
data.text: Participant must meet all eligibility criteria (inclusion and exclusion) during screening window (Day -28 to Day -1) and be registered with IRT

data.name: QW to Q2W Dose Interval Transition
data.text: If participant has received QW dosing for at least 6 cycles and has achieved a PR or better persisting for ≥2 months, the dose interval will be changed from QW to Q2W (eg, beginning C7D1)

data.name: Priming Dose Escalation C1D1 to C1D4
data.text: Dose of elranatamab should be increased from 12 mg (C1D1) to 32 mg on C1D4 as long as the participant meets the redosing criteria. Minimum of 2 days between C1D1 and C1D4.

data.name: Priming Dose Escalation C1D4 to Full Dose C1D8
data.text: Dose of elranatamab should be increased from 32 mg (C1D4) to 76 mg on C1D8 as long as the participant meets the redosing criteria. Minimum of 3 days between C1D4 and C1D8.

data.name: Dose Deferral for Priming Dose Not Meeting Criteria
data.text: If a participant does not meet redosing criteria on C1D4 and C1D8, dosing should be deferred until the criteria are met

data.name: C1D4 Dose Delay and Resumption
data.text: If the C1D4 dose (32 mg) cannot be administered within the protocol-defined window, elranatamab treatment may resume at the planned C1D4 dose (32 mg) upon meeting the re-treatment criteria. Upon re-treatment, if the C1D4 dose (32 mg) was tolerable, the elranatamab dose should be increased to the planned full dose (76 mg) approximately 4 days later.

data.name: Treatment to End of Treatment Transition
data.text: EOT visit to occur within 14 days post-final dose upon confirmed disease progression, unacceptable toxicity, withdrawal of consent, or study termination

data.name: End of Treatment to Follow-Up Transition
data.text: Follow-up visit 28 to 35 days post-final dose

data.name: Follow-Up to Long-Term Follow-Up Transition
data.text: Long-term follow-up visits every 12 weeks (±14 days) for survival status and subsequent anticancer therapies

data.name: Discontinuation for Confirmed Disease Progression
data.text: Participant discontinues study intervention upon confirmed disease progression per IMWG criteria

data.name: Discontinuation for Unacceptable Toxicity
data.text: Participant discontinues study intervention for unacceptable toxicity

data.name: Dose Modification for CRS
data.text: Dose modification/discontinuation in the setting of Grade ≥2 AEs including CRS as described in Section 6.6.2

data.name: Dose Modification for ICANS
data.text: Dose modification/discontinuation in the setting of Grade ≥2 AEs including ICANS as described in Section 6.6.2

data.name: Dose Modification for Peripheral Neuropathy
data.text: Dose modification/discontinuation for peripheral neuropathy as described in Section 6.6.2

data.name: Pregnancy Discontinuation
data.text: If a participant is confirmed to be pregnant, study intervention should be discontinued

data.name: Confirmed Disease Progression
data.description: Participant discontinues study intervention upon confirmed disease progression per IMWG criteria

data.name: Unacceptable Toxicity
data.description: Participant discontinues study intervention due to unacceptable toxicity

data.name: Withdrawal of Consent
data.description: Participant withdraws consent from the study

data.name: Study Termination by Sponsor
data.description: Sponsor terminates the study

data.name: Lost to Follow-Up
data.description: Participant is lost to follow-up

data.name: Death
data.description: Participant death

data.name: Lack of Efficacy
data.description: Discontinuation due to lack of efficacy

data.name: Pregnancy
data.description: Confirmed pregnancy requires discontinuation of study intervention

data.name: Initiation of Subsequent Anticancer Therapy
data.description: Initiation of subsequent anticancer therapy leads to cessation of disease response assessments

data.name: Study Completion
data.description: Completion of all protocol-required visits through long-term follow-up or defined end of study

data.name: QW to Q2W Dosing Decision
data.description: At or after Cycle 7 Day 1, assess whether participant has received QW dosing for at least 6 cycles and achieved PR or better persisting for ≥2 months to transition to Q2W dosing

data.name: Redosing Decision at Start of Each Cycle
data.description: At the start of each new cycle, verify all redosing criteria are met (ANC, platelets, nonhematologic toxicity recovery, no CRS/ICANS, peripheral neuropathy recovery) before administering next dose

data.name: Priming Dose Escalation Decision at C1D4
data.description: Decision to escalate from 12 mg priming dose to 32 mg priming dose on C1D4 based on redosing criteria

data.name: Full Dose Escalation Decision at C1D8
data.description: Decision to escalate from 32 mg priming dose to 76 mg full dose on C1D8 based on redosing criteria

data.name: Disease Response Assessment Decision
data.description: Every 28 days (±1 week), assess disease response per IMWG criteria to determine continuation, confirmation of PD, or response category

data.name: Post-Discontinuation Assessment Continuation Decision
data.description: For participants who discontinue without confirmed PD, decide whether to continue Q4W disease assessments based on confirmed PD, withdrawal of consent, subsequent therapy initiation, lost to follow-up, death, or end of study

data.name: Imaging at Suspected CR/sCR Decision
data.description: At suspected CR/sCR, determine whether imaging is required based on whether imaging was performed within the prior 6 weeks
